name: Lemon Pucker-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shortening and sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Add lemon zest, lemon juice, and eggs to the mixture; blend well.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg) to the wet mixture.
4. Shape the dough into three rolls, each about 2 inches in diameter.
5. Chill or freeze the rolls for later baking.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
7. Thaw the rolls at room temperature if refrigerated, then cut into 1/4-inch-thick slices.
8. Bake the slices for 8-10 minutes until golden brown and cooled immediately on a wire rack.
